description_long: This is a rectangular, brown glass bottle with a silver screw cap and a prominent cream-colored label on the front. The label features the brand name 'Ballantine's' in elegant script, along with additional text and a crest above the main label. The bottle has a broad, flat front and back, with slightly rounded shoulders and a thick base. The side labels are smaller and angled, displaying the brand name in a more understated fashion. The back label contains detailed product information and a barcode, all printed in dark text on a light background. The overall appearance is sleek and classic, typical of a premium whisky or liquor bottle.
description: A rectangular brown glass bottle with a silver screw cap and cream-colored labels, featuring 'Ballantine's' branding and detailed text.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled cream label with 'Ballantine's' script and the silver cap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main cream label with 'Ballantine's' branding, crest, and detailed text.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the angled label and silver cap visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing a large cream label with product information and a barcode.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label: 'Ballantine's' in large script, cream background with a crest above and additional text below; side labels: angled, with 'Ballantine's' in script; back label: cream with product information and barcode. All text is in dark colors, with some red and gold accents.
